sentence: 这栋建筑的地板用的是大理石。
pinyin: Zhè dòng jiànzhú de dìbǎn yòng de shì dàlǐshí.
english: The floor of this building is made of marble.

sentence: 我姐夫昨天送我去机场。
pinyin: Wǒ jiěfu zuótiān sòng wǒ qù jīchǎng.
english: My older sister's husband drove me to the airport yesterday.

meaning: 1. artistic mood or conception; 2. creative concept
sentence: 这首诗的意境非常深远。
pinyin: Zhè shǒu shī de yìjìng fēicháng shēnyuǎn.
english: The artistic mood of this poem is very profound.

meaning: 1. to enter the army; 2. to enlist
sentence: 他十八岁就选择入伍，参军报国。
pinyin: Tā shíbā suì jiù xuǎnzé rùwǔ, cānjūn bàoguó.
english: He chose to enlist in the military at eighteen to serve his country.

meaning: 1. to fly across; 2. to fly over; 3. to fly past; 4. (literary) (of on
sentence: 飞机飞越山脉时遇到了气流。
pinyin: Fēijī fēiyuè shānmài shí yùdào le qìliú.
english: The plane encountered turbulence while flying over the mountain range.
